name: iris
description: Editorial HTML reports for AI analysis and research notes.

interface.shortDescription: Turn analysis into readable HTML reports.
interface.longDescription: Iris turns AI analysis, research notes, codebase readings, strategy judgments, and technical explanations into self-contained editorial HTML reports. Each report leads with a thesis, organizes findings around evidence, uses diagrams only when they clarify the argument, and closes with assumptions, open decisions, and next actions.
defaultPrompt: Use Iris to turn this analysis into an HTML report.
Use Iris to render this codebase reading as a report.
Use Iris to shape these research notes into evidence.
